blockedAssertions.reason: Login flow works without manual refresh - BLOCKED: Cannot start FastAPI server. Server process starts but immediately crashes. Multiple launch attempts failed (python main.py, python -m uvicorn main:app). Process dies before binding to port 8000. Additionally, agent-browser tool has broken playwright-core dependency preventing browser automation.
End-to-end request flow works - BLOCKED: Same as m3-a7. Cannot test without running server and working browser automation.

appliedUpdates.description: Committed fix to use AccountManager.get_session() for session validation in admin UI endpoint. This was an uncommitted change that may have been causing import errors.
